title: citronella lucidula
intro: Citronella lucidula is a species of plant in the genus Cymbopogon, commonly known as a type of citronella grass or lemongrass, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of citronella lucidula include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and immune system support, as well as its potential to aid in the management of anxiety and stress. Citronella lucidula is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
